prompt: dv-spec-parse — but I haven't told you which spec file to use yet. Project name is i2c_master.

assertions.text: Skill asks for the missing SPEC_FILE before proceeding
assertions.evidence: Skill correctly halted at Step 1, identified SPEC_FILE as missing, and asked user for the path

assertions.text: Skill does NOT generate any output files without the spec
assertions.evidence: No output files created; only response.txt with the question to user

assertions.text: Skill recognises project name was already provided and does not ask again
assertions.evidence: Response asked only for SPEC_FILE; did not ask for PROJECT_NAME which was already given
